fossil_endocast_visibility: Partial - broad external cerebral surface only
estimation_method: Human/chimp neocortex from Rilling & Insel log observed neocortical volumes; Australopithecus estimate uses whole ECV proxy only.
notes: Do not interpret as exact fossil cortical volume; endocasts preserve external braincase surface, not cortical gray/white compartments.

estimation_method: No Heiss-level fossil lobe volume available; uses neocortical human/chimp ratio and whole-ECV human/A. afarensis proxy.
notes: Region-specific expansion is not directly estimated here. Frontal/parietal/temporal/occipital boundaries on endocasts are uncertain; use as screening rows.

mapped_macro_region: Internal forebrain / limbic or diencephalic structure
estimation_method: Not visible on endocasts; requires extant-species MRI/histology segmentation.
notes: Comparable to Heiss segmentation in living humans/chimps, but not recoverable from Australopithecus endocasts.

confidence: Medium for human/chimp direction; none for fossil
estimation_method: Exact caudate/putamen ratios not extracted here; Chen et al. report human expansion of subcortical structures, with striatum/thalamus/GP ratios 1.52-2.13 and caudate more expanded than putamen in shape maps.
notes: Use Chen et al. primary data/figures for side-specific caudate-putamen values if exact structure-specific ratios are required.

confidence: Medium for human/chimp direction; none for fossil
estimation_method: Exact caudate/putamen ratios not extracted here; Chen et al. report human expansion of subcortical structures, with striatum/thalamus/GP ratios 1.52-2.13 and caudate more expanded than putamen in shape maps.
notes: Use Chen et al. primary data/figures for side-specific caudate-putamen values if exact structure-specific ratios are required.

estimation_method: Lower end of Chen et al. reported human/chimp subcortical ratio range is right globus pallidus 1.52; exact bilateral average not extracted.
notes: Use as conservative GP lower-bound ratio, not a bilateral mean.

estimation_method: Upper end of Chen et al. reported human/chimp subcortical ratio range is left thalamus 2.13; Heiss medial thalamus is not identical to whole thalamus.
notes: Proxy for thalamic expansion only; not nucleus-specific and not fossil-estimable.

fossil_endocast_visibility: Weak partial - posterior fossa/endocast shape only
estimation_method: Endocasts may weakly inform posterior fossa/cerebellar region, but Heiss cerebellar cortex/vermis/dentate labels are not directly fossil-visible.
notes: Treat only as a coarse posterior fossa proxy. Dentate nucleus and vermis are not visible on fossil endocasts.
